revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="color:black;background: <nowiki>#</nowiki>{{CategoryBgColor|{{{1|}}}}};{{#if:{{{align|}}}| vertical-align: {{#switch: {{lc:{{{align}}}}}
  | ml | mc | mr = middle
  | bl | bc | br = bottom
  | #default = top
}}; text-align: {{#switch: {{lc:{{{align}}}}}
  | tc | mc | bc = center
  | tr | mr | br = right
  | #default = left
}};}}"|{{{2|}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-

  | ml | mc | mr = middle
  | bl | bc | br = bottom
  | #default = top

  | tc | mc | bc = center
  | tr | mr | br = right
  | #default = left
}};}}"|{{{2|}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- | [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>style="color:black;background: <nowiki>#</nowiki>{{CategoryBgColor|{{{1|}}}}};{{#if:{{{align|}}}| vertical-align: {{#switch: {{lc:{{{align}}}}} | ml | mc | mr = middle | bl | bc | br = bottom | #default = top }}; text-align: {{#switch: {{lc:{{{align}}}}} | tc | mc | bc = center | tr | mr | br = right | #default = left }};}}"|{{{2|}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- | [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>style="color:black;background: <nowiki>#</nowiki>{{CategoryBgColor|{{{1|}}}}};{{#if:{{{align|}}}| vertical-align: {{#switch: {{lc:{{{align}}}}} | ml | mc | mr = middle | bl | bc | br = bottom | #default = top }}; text-align: {{#switch: {{lc:{{{align}}}}} | tc | mc | bc = center | tr | mr | br = right | #default = left }};}}"|{{{2|}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- | [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>style="color:black;background: <nowiki>#</nowiki>{{CategoryBgColor|{{{1|}}}}};{{#if:{{{align|}}}| vertical-align: {{#switch: {{lc:{{{align}}}}} | ml | mc | mr = middle | bl | bc | br = bottom | #default = top }}; text-align: {{#switch: {{lc:{{{align}}}}} | tc | mc | bc = center | tr | mr | br = right | #default = left }};}}"|{{{2|}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CellCategory here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CellCategory for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- | [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>style="color:black;background: <nowiki>#</nowiki>{{CategoryBgColor|{{{1|}}}}};{{#if:{{{align|}}}| vertical-align: {{#switch: {{lc:{{{align}}}}} | ml | mc | mr = middle | bl | bc | br = bottom | #default = top }}; text-align: {{#switch: {{lc:{{{align}}}}} | tc | mc | bc = center | tr | mr | br = right | #default = left }};}}"|{{{2|}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
